description: Standalone web audio visualizer — drop in a track or open the mic and watch it move across seven canvas2D modes with beat-reactive palettes, BPM display, and a one-click 9:16 WebM loop export.
features: 7 canvas2D visualizer modes — bars, waveform, spectrogram, radial, Lissajous, constellation, particles
Drag-drop MP3/WAV/OGG with jsmediatags ID3 extraction (title, artist, album art)
Live microphone input with sensitivity control
Spectral-flux beat detection + rolling-median BPM display
8 palettes (Trollspace default + chromatic mode) with smooth 500ms lerp transitions
Stem-band sliders (sub/bass/mid/treble) to shape visual response
PNG screenshot + 5-second 9:16 WebM loop export via MediaRecorder
Fullscreen mode with auto-hiding controls, aspect-ratio switcher (16:9 / 1:1 / 9:16 / 4:5)
Shareable permalink encodes mode + palette + aspect + bands into URL hash
